SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsEnabledHint: Enable or disable displaying character art on hover.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsArtTypeHint: Choose whether to prioritize the Actor's character sheet art or the Token art.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsPermissionHint: Set the minimum actor permission required for a user to see the hover art.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsDelayHint: Delay in milliseconds before the art is shown. Prevents flashing when moving the mouse across multiple tokens.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsShowNameLabelHi: Display the name of the actor at the bottom of the art card.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsShowNPCsHint: If disabled, players (non-GMs) will not see hover art for tokens without player owners (NPCs/Monsters).
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsCardSizeHint: Width and height of the hover art card in pixels.
SIMPLE_HOVER_ART.SettingsPositionHint: Select where on the screen the hover art card should be displayed.
